Electrician in Fort Myers, FL

The City of Palms and gateway to Southwest Florida. Full-service electrical contractor for Fort Myers homes, businesses, and historic properties.

(941) 555-0100
About Fort Myers

Electrical Services in Fort Myers, Florida

Fort Myers, known as the City of Palms, is the commercial and cultural hub of Lee County. Home to the historic winter estates of Thomas Edison and Henry Ford, this vibrant city blends rich history with modern development along the beautiful Caloosahatchee River.

Carter Electric has been serving Fort Myers for over 15 years, and we understand the diverse electrical needs of this dynamic city. From historic homes in the River District that require careful preservation to modern commercial developments, our licensed electricians bring expertise to every project.

We also specialize in multi-family electrical services, working with property managers throughout Fort Myers to keep condos and apartment complexes running smoothly. Our maintenance plans and 24/7 emergency service ensure your tenants are never left in the dark.

Fort Myers at a Glance

Population86,000+
Founded1886
CountyLee County
Known For

Edison & Ford Winter Estates, downtown River District, spring training

Our Services

Electrical Services in Fort Myers

Historic Home Electrical

Expert electrical services for Fort Myers' historic homes in the River District and surrounding areas.

Commercial Lighting

Professional lighting solutions for Fort Myers businesses, from the River District to retail centers.

EV Charging Stations

EV charger installation for homes and businesses throughout Fort Myers. Future-ready solutions.

Electrical Repairs

Fast, reliable electrical repairs across Fort Myers. 24/7 emergency service available.

Multi-Family Services

Specialized electrical services for Fort Myers condos and apartment complexes. Maintenance plans available.

Your Fort Myers Electrician

From the River District to Gateway, we serve all of Fort Myers with professional electrical expertise.
